purpose: Validate the CO-budgeted closed-loop search path before replacing the controlled CM fixture with true Phase3CM reward audit.

phase3cp-reward-gated-medium-search-smok.role: read CO arm budgets, generate a small scheduler-controlled candidate set, pass CA, controlled CM fixture, CN memory, and CO reschedule

hard_rules: candidate generation must use Phase3CO budget table
CEM exploit must respect CO probe cap in the initial generation
fresh budget floor must be preserved
CA bridge remains ranking bridge only
controlled CM fixture is not alpha proof
holdout is not used as optimizer feedback
next real run must replace fixture with phase3cm-train-portfolio-sortino-reward-audit
exit_gate_for_phase3cp_smoke: generated candidate count equals requested smoke budget
CM fixture rows match CA candidate count
CN memory rows match CA candidate count
CO reschedule allocation equals requested reschedule budget
reschedule fresh share remains above floor
next_phase: Phase3CP real small run using true Phase3CM reward audit
